Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the rankings. LINC leads at rank 1 with a 95.3 score, posting extraordinary 10-year returns of 1237.81% while maintaining all four moving average signals (SMA 30/50/100/200), though its 5-year return of 484.52% shows notably stronger recent acceleration than its earlier decade performance. ISSC follows closely with similarly extreme metrics—326.65% 1-year returns and 998.89% over 10 years—but demonstrates even more explosive near-term momentum with a 3-month/1-month ratio of 4.78x, suggesting a dramatic acceleration in the past three months compared to LINC's steadier 2.2x ratio. Both tickers pass all ratio checks and show confirmed volatility flags, indicating the extreme returns are accompanied by elevated risk rather than smooth gains. Notably, ISSC significantly outperforms SPY across all timeframes (310.56% vs 1-year, 325.61% vs 5-year), while LINC's outperformance remains substantial but less pronounced, suggesting different return drivers or market cycles in their respective momentum builds.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
